content.text:
I checked the mesh (searched for "Nestle" and for nodeType:Pricing across the graph and whole mesh) — there’s no created Nestle pricing node yet and no update from the Executor.

Next steps — what would you like me to do?
- Re-send the create request to the Executor using the defaults I proposed (Name: "Nestle Pricing - 2027-01-01", Inception: 2027-01-01, Currency: USD, Region: Global, Status: Draft).  
- Or update the details first (currency, region, target margins, specific SKUs to include).  
Tell me which and I’ll proceed.
